summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CampusMart C2C rental marketplace after trailing slash fix. Backend APIs fully functional (15/15 tests passed). Frontend UI loads correctly, API integration working, theme toggle functional. Minor authentication persistence issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: User session not persisting across page navigation - user gets logged out when navigating to dashboard
ui_bugs.details: After successful signup/login, user is redirected to dashboard but subsequent navigation causes logout

passed_tests: Item CRUD operations (all endpoints without trailing slash)
Featured items loading from database (4 items)
Browse page showing items from database (4 items)
Search functionality from landing page and browse page
Authentication page UI and form elements
Signup flow completion with redirect to dashboard
Dashboard stats display (Total Listings, Active Rentals, Earnings, Pending Requests)
All main pages load without errors
action_item_for_main_agent: MEDIUM: Fix authentication persistence issue - User sessions are not persisting across navigation, causing users to be logged out when navigating between pages. This affects user experience but doesn't break core functionality. All other features including API integration, theme toggle, and data loading are working correctly.
